name: note-connector
description: ChatGPT Connector for note.com — MCP server with Apps SDK UI. One command setup: uv, Playwright, tunnel.

scripts.build: tsc -p tsconfig.json && mkdir -p py && cp -r ../src ../pyproject.toml py/ && find py -name __pycache__ -type d -exec rm -rf {} + 2>/dev/null; true
scripts.test: npm run build && node --test dist/net.test.js dist/version.test.js dist/config.test.js
